html.p: Configure the credentials the app needs to reach the Fleak AI mapping service and the Zephflow execution engine. API keys are stored in Splunk's encrypted credential store.

div.label: Fleak API key *
div.small: Issued from the Fleak console. Starts with flk_.

div.label: Zephflow base URL *
div.small: Your self-hosted Zephflow URL, or the Fleak-hosted endpoint provided to you.

div.label: Zephflow API token
div.small: Required for the Fleak-hosted endpoint; leave blank if your Zephflow instance does not require auth.
